Chipped Beef Dip

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 2/8 oz Cream Cheese,
  • softened 2 tsp. Mayo or Miracle Whip
  • 9 green onions, chopped small
  • 2 oz pkg Buddig dried, chipped Beef

Directions

  1. Mix all together and serve with Crackers.
